sentences.text: Rex and Ron met a raptor in the dark.
Rip ran past a raptor and rested in a den.
Rob got a rib and Rex got a raptor.
Ron and Rex ran past a red raptor.
Rip rested as a raptor ran past a rib.
Rex ran and Rob met a raptor in the dark.
Rob and Rip got a rib and a raptor.
Rex met a raptor and Ron met a rat.
Rip got a rib and a raptor in the mud.
Ron rested and Rex got a red raptor.
Rex and Rip ran past a rib in the dark.
Rob met a raptor and Ron met a rib.
Rip and Rex rested and a raptor ran past.
Ron got a red rib and Rex got a rat.
Rex and Rob hid a rib in the dark.
Rip got a raptor and Ron got a red rib.
Rex met a rat and a raptor in a swamp.
Ron and Rip ran and a raptor met Rex.
Rob hid in the dark and a raptor ran.
Rex got a rib and Rip got a raptor.
